blocks.text: `RIIDO_WORKDIR_ROOT` owns the exact local workdir root path. Store-channel app data roots are C11-owned; C6 only materializes roots accepted by C11 and never creates Store-channel home fallbacks.

blocks.code:
$RIIDO_WORKDIR_ROOT/
  {workspace_id}/
    tasks/
      {task_id}/
        runs/
          {run_id}/
            workdir/
            output/
            logs/
            artifacts/
            native-config/
            ir/
            archive.json

items: Protected status for sibling directories is decided by C7 `T-PATH`.
Terminal local archive defaults to `keep-in-place`; `archiveURI` is `file://<run-root>`.
Daemon stop that cancels an in-flight run still follows terminal workspace lifecycle and writes `archive.json`.
Filesystem cleanup is disabled by default and uses `RIIDO_WORKDIR_RETENTION_SECONDS` only for archived run roots.
Size-based or task-count cleanup is not a local daemon default.
